name: World Soul - Carbon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>地</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>久</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－カルボン
desc: You can Tribute this Normal Summoned/Set card; add 1 EARTH Fairy monster from your Deck to your hand, except "World Soul - Carbon". If a face-up Fairy monster(s) you control is sent to the GY, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can place this card on top of your Deck. You can only use 1 "World Soul - Carbon" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute this Normal Summoned/Set card; add 1 EARTH Fairy monster from your Deck to your hand, except "World Soul - Carbon". If a face-up Fairy monster(s) you control is sent to the GY, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can place this card on top of your Deck. You can only use 1 "World Soul - Carbon" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: You can Tribute this Normal Summoned/Set card; add 1 EARTH Fairy monster from your Deck to your hand, except "World Soul - Carbon". If a face-up Fairy monster(s) you control is sent to the GY, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can place this card on top of your Deck. You can only use 1 "World Soul - Carbon" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

action: Activates if other cards are sent to the Graveyard
Places itself from the player's Graveyard on the top of the Deck
